title: Guard Diagnostics
description: Look up guardrail decision explanations and label feedback, or submit a guard model promotion proposal.

search.label: Request ID
search.placeholder: Enter a request_id to look up its guardrail decision explanation

states.initial: Enter a request_id to look up the guardrail decision explanation for that request.
states.empty: No guardrail explanation found for this request (explanations are held in an in-memory ring buffer and may have expired).
states.notWired: Adaptive Guard is not enabled; Guard Diagnostics is currently unavailable.

feedback.title: Label Feedback
feedback.commentPlaceholder: Optional: add a note (will be PII-masked on submit)

errors.rateLimited: Too many requests, please try again later.
errors.anomalyBlocked: Feedback flagged by anomaly detection and not added to the training corpus.

promote.title: Model Promotion
promote.confirmMessage: This creates an autonomy approval proposal that must be approved on the FinOps approvals page before it takes effect.
promote.success: Promotion proposal created; please process it on the FinOps approvals page.
promote.notEnabled: Adaptive Guard is not enabled; cannot submit a promotion proposal.
promote.missingFields: Please fill in action, model ID and version.
